privileged_info_summary: The Hounsfield Unit (HU) ranges for abdominal tissues in this task are: fat (-150 to -30), muscle (10 to 70), liver (40 to 150), blood (100 to 350), and bone (100 to 500). These values are consistent with clinical standards for contrast-enhanced CT scans. The task data is synthetic, generated with these specific HU characteristics.
